game_meta.name: League of Legends
game_meta.tagline: 5v5 MOBA — destroy the enemy Nexus through lane control, jungle pathing, and team-fight execution.
game_meta.character_vocab: champions (170+ available, 5 picked per match across 5 positions: top, jungle, mid, ADC, support)
game_meta.round_format: Best-of-1 or Best-of-5 (tournament). Single match ~25-45 minutes. No rounds.
key_mechanics: Last-hitting minions for gold (CS — Creep Score)
Vision control via Wards (Stealth, Control, Farsight)
Lane phase → Mid game → Late game power-spike scaling
Drake / Herald / Baron Nashor objective trades
Items + Mythic/Legendary build paths per champion

summoners-rift.name: Summoner's Rift
summoners-rift.notes: Standard 5v5 map. Three lanes + jungle + neutral objectives.

Top.notes: Solo lane top of map. Often isolated 1v1 matchups.

Jungle.notes: Pathing decides early game; should track enemy jungle CD.

Mid.notes: Central lane. Shortest rotation paths to side lanes.

ADC.notes: Bot lane carry. Scales with items; needs protection late game.

Support.notes: Bot lane utility. Vision + peel + engage windows.

iron_bronze: Last-hitting only when minions are low — should pre-aim attack
No vision purchases; running blind into ganks
Trying to 1v5 instead of grouping at 14+ min
silver_gold: Bad recall timing — backing with full HP instead of empty mana
Wrong build choices vs enemy comp
Tunnel-vision on kills instead of objectives
platinum_plus: Sub-optimal jungle pathing on first clear
Not tracking enemy summoner cooldowns (Flash, Teleport)

review_template.style: Specific over generic. Reference visible HUD elements, in-game timers, and concrete tactical concepts. Never say "play smart" or "use abilities better".

vocabulary: standard tactical vocabulary varies by game; defer to game_meta.character_vocab and key_mechanics for terms
